extension.name: Light Mate
desc.sendRequestShortcut: Set the shortcut key for sending message.
desc.codeHighlightTheme: Set the theme for code highlighting. **This will take effect after restarting the plugin.**
desc.chat.useDefaultSystemPrompt: Whether to use the default system prompt. If the user has not defined a system prompt for the current model and this option is enabled, the extension's system prompt will be used.
desc.chat.continuousChat: Whether to enable continuous chat. If enabled, the model will retrieve the entire chat session history, but it will consume more input `tokens`. If disabled, the model will only receive the current request content and lose the memory of the ongoing chat.
